GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [w_warehouse_name@0 ASC, i_item_id@1 ASC]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
        GpuFilterExec
          GpuProjectExec
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, i_item_id], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_warehouse_name@0, i_item_id@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, i_item_id], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date < Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN date_dim.d_date >= Utf8("2000-03-11") THEN inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand ELSE Int64(0) END)]
                    GpuProjectExec
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                        GpuHashJoinExec
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                GpuFilterExec
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuProjectExec
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                  GpuHashJoinExec
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                          GpuFilterExec
                                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                        GpuProjectExec
                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                            GpuHashJoinExec
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_warehouse_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=1
                                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_warehouse_sk@2], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
  GpuSortExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
        GpuFilterExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
          GpuProjectExec: row_width=88, subtree_max_row_bytes=168
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=160
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=80, subtree_max_row_bytes=152

                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                        GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=152

                                    GpuScanExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8

                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=152
                                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=72, subtree_max_row_bytes=152

                                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=88
